summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of Fısıltı Gazetesi (backend + frontend). Backend: 23/23 pytest tests passed covering health, categories, auth (register/login/me/logout), whisper CRUD, voting (toggle/switch), comments and profile stats. Frontend: register → home (logged-in nav), compose → detail with comment posting, voting (0→1) on home card, profile page, logout + admin login all verified via Playwright on the public preview URL.

issues: GET /api/auth/me fires on initial load and logs two 401s to console for anonymous visitors — functionally fine but noisy; consider only calling /auth/me when a session_token cookie is detected or treating 401 as silent expected state.

action_items: Optional: suppress expected 401 console errors from /api/auth/me when no session exists (not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is currently a single 600-line file; if more endpoints are added it should be split into routers/auth, routers/whispers, routers/profile and a models module (per code review guideline >700 lines).
Whisper sort='new' uses mongo sort, but 'top'/'trending' load up to 200 docs and sort in Python — works for MVP volume but should move to aggregation/indexed scoring at scale.

google_session re-uses Emergent's session_token as our cookie value when provided; if the same Emergent token is reused across logins, the unique index on user_sessions.session_token could collide. Consider always generating an internal token regardless.
delete_whisper deletes votes/comments sequentially (3 round-trips) — not transactional. Acceptable for MVP but worth a note.
All data-testid attributes required by the request are present and the cookies are correctly httpOnly/secure/samesite=none for cross-site preview env.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@fisilti.com / Admin1234! (works). Test users created dynamically with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: During testing, several TEST_-prefixed users and whispers were created (kahvehane, berber, taksi, park, lokanta, market, caybahcesi, kuafor). Admin seed verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env). All 23 tests pass against the public preview URL. Frontend uses native HTML <select> for compose category (data-testid='compose-category-select') — use page.select_option or click + select option text; clicking the option element directly is reported 'not visible' but the value still propagates because the select responds to the click on the trigger. The Emergent Google OAuth callback was intentionally NOT exercised (no real Google session); only the redirect setup exists.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing functionality. The one initial test failure (`test_register_creates_user_and_sets_cookie`) was a test-side bug: the backend correctly lowercases email at registration but the test compared against the original mixed-case string. Fixed by comparing against email.lower().
